title: Sensor Conveyor Calibration: Step 1
description:
Sensor Conveyor Calibration: Step 1

Sensor Conveyor Calibration: Step 1

Select the Part Flow Direction to best match the conveyor you are calibrating. The instruction pictures will change according to the setting. Part Flow Direction is only used to aid in the instructions. It has no affect on the calibration.

Place a part on the conveyor and move the conveyor toward the sensor until the sensor just turns on.

Click the Teach button.
